# Session Handoff: Bootstrap 5 Refactor and Teal Theme Sweep

**Date:** May 8, 2026
**Repository:** consulting.berthelemy.net
**Branch:** Refactor-to-bootstrap
**Head commit:** 8be77bd

## Current State

- Working tree is clean (`git status --short` returns no changes).
- Site builds successfully with Jekyll.
- Bootstrap 5 is now the active framework for templates/components in scope.
- Legacy purple palette has been replaced with the new teal family where runtime assets are used.

## What Was Completed

### 1) Framework and Base Layout Migration

- Bootstrap CSS/JS wired in includes.
- Core layout and nav/footer structure refactored to Bootstrap markup.
- Main custom theme file is now:
  - `assets/css/bootstrap-custom.css`

### 2) Specialized Layouts Refactored

Refactored to Bootstrap-first structure:

- `_layouts/simple_default.html`
- `_layouts/expertise.html`
- `_layouts/lesson.html`
- `_layouts/post.html`
- `_layouts/resource.html`
- `_layouts/standard.html`
- `_layouts/tag.html`
- `_layouts/tool.html`

### 3) Include Components Refactored

Updated major shared includes:

- `_includes/simple_head.html`
- `_includes/scripts.html`
- `_includes/simple_nav.html`
- `_includes/menu-list.html`
- `_includes/simple_footer.html`
- `_includes/cta.html`
- `_includes/expertise-list.html`
- `_includes/services.html`
- `_includes/websites.html`
- `_includes/youtube.html`

### 4) Listing Pages and Card Grids

- `/about` proposition section converted to 2-column responsive card grid.
- `/resources` listing converted to 2-column responsive card grid.
- `/articles` listing converted to 3-column responsive card grid.
- `/` homepage recent articles converted to Bootstrap card grid.

### 5) Accessibility and Visual QA Fixes

- Header and hero title contrast corrected to pass AA by using white text on dark/accent backgrounds.
- Card links made full-card clickable (overlay) when card title has a link.
- Added hover/focus affordance on cards.
- Added spacing below related articles in post layout before newsletter embed.
- Added spacing between contact form block (Send button area) and newsletter section.

### 6) Resource Page Optimizations

Updated resource pages with Bootstrap-first structure and cleaner behavior:

- `collections/_resources/build-vs-buy.html`
  - question blocks now use proper Bootstrap card body spacing and form-check spacing.
- `collections/_resources/elearning-quality-framework.html`
  - removed expand/close behavior and details/summary interaction.
  - replaced with static responsive card grid.
- `collections/_resources/how-to-buy-software.html`
  - legacy grid converted to Bootstrap row/columns; button styling normalized.
- `collections/_resources/sitecounter.md`
  - screenshot constrained with reusable `resource-screenshot` class.
- `collections/_resources/standards.html`
  - legacy grid/aside structures replaced with Bootstrap-compatible markup.

### 7) Teal Palette Sweep (Old Purple Removal)

Old purple hex values were replaced with the new teal palette in runtime-relevant assets:

- `assets/css/bootstrap-custom.css`
- `assets/css/main.css`
- `assets/css/overrides.scss`
- `assets/sass/libs/_vars.scss`
- `assets/js/js-to-png.js`

Also updated internal skill documentation to match:

- `.github/skills/site-colour-scheme/SKILL.md`

## Commit Timeline (Most Recent First)

- `8be77bd` refactor: teal theme sweep and card UX refinements
- `54e82c4` refactor: refine card UX, resource layouts, and accent color
- `efebe1b` refactor: Bootstrap-first layout optimization for posts and resource pages
- `f75bd38` fix: WCAG AA contrast - use white text on purple header and hero overlays
- `7934ddb` Initial bootstrap implementation
- `7c864dc` Implementation plan for bootstrap refactor

## Validation Performed

- `bundle exec jekyll build` run multiple times after each stage.
- Latest successful build observed in session output:
  - `Generating...`
  - `done in 15.344 seconds.`

## Known Follow-Ups (Optional)

No blockers remain. Optional improvements if desired:

1. Add keyboard-focus-visible treatment for full-card links (in addition to card `:focus-within`).
2. Run a manual visual pass on smallest mobile breakpoints for all card-heavy pages.
3. If legacy Hyperspace CSS is no longer needed, plan a controlled deprecation pass for unused selectors/files.

## Handoff Notes for Next Engineer

- Start from branch `Refactor-to-bootstrap` at commit `8be77bd`.
- The repo is currently in a stable, buildable state.
- If continuing UI polish, prioritize visual regression checks on:
  - homepage cards
  - resource detail pages
  - post detail pages (related articles + newsletter spacing)
